ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seeds" (
  "seed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seed sample */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the seed sample */,
  "perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the seed sample */,
  "compactness" REAL /* Compactness of the seed sample */,
  "kernel_length" REAL /* Length of the kernel */,
  "kernel_width" REAL /* Width of the kernel */,
  "asymmetry" REAL /* Asymmetry value of the seed */,
  "kernel_groove" REAL /* Kernel groove value */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the seed (e.g., type or species) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the seed sample */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Specific variety of the seed */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the seed was harvested */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in which the seed was grown */,
  "climate_conditions" TEXT /* Climate conditions during the growth period */,
  "growth_stage" TEXT /* Growth stage of the plant when the seed was collected */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the seed sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the seed sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seeds_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations related to the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., field trial, greenhouse study) */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project under which the experiment is conducted */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "experiment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the experiment in days */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Description of the experimental design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., researcher, agronomist) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the analyst */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division within the organization */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the analyst started working with the company */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise or specializations of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings from the analysis */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed, comparative) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used for the analysis */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the analysis */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Detailed findings from the analysis */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the findings */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the report has been published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
